body: This bead is over-scoped for the current server worktree. The server review code only has session persistence and prompt assembly in cli/internal/server/review_session.go:22-239, while the actual reviewer routing, downgrade telemetry, and prompt-refusal handling live in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go:474-780. Cost-cap enforcement for the worker loop already exists in cli/internal/server/workers.go:790-855, but there is no server-side turn dispatcher to hook the requested "before each turn" max_billable_usd check into. Satisfying all acceptance criteria would require crossing into the non-scope dispatcher/routing path and depending on the ddx-0e5c3005 / ddx-f7c3d512 follow-on work, so I am stopping here rather than partially implementing an incomplete contract.

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
reason: This bead is over-scoped for the current server worktree. The server review code only has session persistence and prompt assembly in cli/internal/server/review_session.go:22-239, while the actual reviewer routing, downgrade telemetry, and prompt-refusal handling live in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go:474-780. Cost-cap enforcement for the worker loop already exists in cli/internal/server/workers.go:790-855, but there is no server-side turn dispatcher to hook the requested "before each turn" max_billable_usd check into. Satisfying all acceptance criteria would require crossing into the non-scope dispatcher/routing path and depending on the ddx-0e5c3005 / ddx-f7c3d512 follow-on work, so I am stopping here rather than partially implementing an incomplete contract.
